(In this stub,"] # [doc = "    candidates are derived from the target descriptor and the spore surface list.)"] # [doc = " 3. **Hash-canonicality check**: recompute the spore's identity and compare to the declared"] # [doc = "    hash (ADR-003 / C4). Never silently accept a mismatch."] # [doc = " 4. **No-opaque-lowering check**: assert no opaque lowering step is present in the pipeline"] # [doc = "    (VR-4). If one is present,"] # [doc = "    return `Err(DeployError::OpaqueStepDetected { step })` naming it."] # [doc = " 5. **Success**: all checks pass → `Ok(DeployResult::Deployed { spore_id, verification })`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Guarantee tag: `Empirical`"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The VR-4 check is structural (no opaque step in the stub pipeline) but the full native deploy"] # [doc = " path is not yet proven end-to-end — the MLIR toolchain integration is Phase-6-gated. The content-hash check is `Exact`; the overall op tag"] # [doc = " is bounded by the weakest component (`Declared` for the opaque-step check; `Empirical` for the"] # [doc = " full path)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Fallibility"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " - `Err(DeployError::MissingInput)` — required input absent"] # [doc = " - `Err(DeployError::AmbiguousInput { candidates })` — more than one candidate"] # [doc = " - `Err(DeployError::HashMismatch { expected, actual })` — hash mismatch"] # [doc = " - `Err(DeployError::OpaqueStepDetected { step })` — VR-4 violation"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Effects: `io` (may write to filesystem for `Local` target; `InMemory` has no effects)"] pub fn germinate (spore : & SporeUnit , target : & DeployTarget) -> Result < DeployResult , DeployError > { match target { DeployTarget :: Local { path } if path . is_empty () => { return Err (DeployError :: MissingInput) ; } _ => { } } let surface = spore . raw () . surface . clone () ; if let DeployTarget :: InMemory = target { if surface . len () > 1 { return Err (DeployError :: AmbiguousInput { candidates : surface , }) ; } } if let Err (e) = spore . verify () { let (expected , actual) = match e { crate :: spore_ops :: SporeErr :: HashMismatch { expected , found } => { (expected . as_str () . to_owned () , found . as_str () . to_owned ()) } other => { let _ = other ; return Err (DeployError :: MissingInput) ; } } ; return Err (DeployError :: HashMismatch { expected , actual }) ; } let opaque_step = detect_opaque_step (target) ; if let Some (step) = opaque_step { return Err (DeployError :: OpaqueStepDetected { step }) ; } let spore_id = spore . identity () . clone () ; let verification = DeployVerification { content_hash_canonical : true , no_opaque_lowering : true , } ; Ok (DeployResult :: Deployed { spore_id , verification , }) }

# [doc = " The EXPLAIN of a germination outcome — VR-4 / SC-3 / C3 / G11."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Returns a human-readable, deterministic string describing:"] # [doc = " - Whether the deploy succeeded or failed,"] # [doc = " - The spore identity (or the error),"] # [doc = " - What was checked (content-hash canonical, no-opaque-lowering),"] # [doc = " - The VR-4 opaque-lowering result explicitly."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The string always contains \"hash\" and \"opaque\" (or \"lowering\") so VR-4 is always surfaced"] # [doc = " in the EXPLAIN output — no silent omission."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Guarantee tag: `Exact` (deterministic; a total pure function of the result)"] # [doc = " # Fallibility: total"] # [doc = " # Effects: none"] # [must_use] pub fn explain_deploy (result : & DeployResult) -> String { match result { DeployResult :: Deployed { spore_id , verification , } => { format ! ("deploy-result: Deployed\n\
                 spore-id (content-hash): {id}\n\
                 content_hash_canonical: {hash_ok} (Exact — BLAKE3 deterministic; C4/ADR-003)\n\
                 no_opaque_lowering: {opaque_ok} (Declared — structural assertion; VR-4)\n\
                 outcome: all invariants checked; no opaque lowering step detected in pipeline" , id = spore_id . as_str () , hash_ok = verification . content_hash_canonical , opaque_ok = verification . no_opaque_lowering ,) } DeployResult :: Failed (err) => { format ! ("deploy-result: Failed\n\

                 no_opaque_lowering: not verified (deploy aborted before opaque-lowering check; \
                 VR-4 assertion was not reached or triggered the refusal)" ,) } } }
